title: salix betulifolia
intro: Salix betulifolia, also known as the white willow or Eurasian weeping willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix betulifolia include reducing fever, relieving headaches and arthritis pain, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Salix betulifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
